implemented_definition: 1990-2010 inclusive as encoded in threshold filenames, global attributes, and archived threshold-generation scripts
qualification: Thresholds are fixed through historical and future event detection

implemented_definition: Time-invariant spatial quantile fields
qualification: Threshold files contain no calendar-month or day-of-year threshold dimension

implemented_definition: Base R stats::quantile with na.rm=TRUE and no type override; therefore Hyndman-Fan type 7
qualification: Exact threshold-generation scripts are archived in release_metadata/source_code
Strict operator: tasmax > threshold
Strict operator: tasmin < threshold; baseline audit confirms p01 behavior
Strict operator plus pr >= 1 mm d-1
Strict operator plus sfcWind >= 8 m s-1

implemented_definition: Layer 2 (p05) from the legacy baseline water-balance/SPEI-3 threshold workflow; generated with SPEI::spei(scale=3, rectangular kernel) and type-7 quantiles
qualification: The released daily indicator is not canonical SPEI; source alias drought_q2_main means second stored quantile, not p02

implemented_definition: For each valid grid cell and processed year, z = (pr-PET-annual mean)/annual SD; rounded to 2 decimals; zero or non-finite annual SD remains missing
qualification: Event-year score is not canonical SPEI, is not accumulated, and is not standardized to the threshold baseline

implemented_definition: Source dates are parsed to R Date; within each model-year, variables are aligned to the modal time dimension
qualification: If a variable exceeds the modal dimension, day index 60 is removed; if shorter, day index 59 is duplicated. A static implementation audit and its qualification are supplied in calendar_harmonization_audit.csv

implemented_definition: Input K converted to degrees C by subtracting 273.15
qualification: Conditional magnitude rasters use degrees C

implemented_definition: Input kg m-2 s-1 multiplied by 86400 to mm d-1
qualification: Conditional magnitude rasters use mm d-1

implemented_definition: Input PET is FAO-56 Penman-Monteith potential evapotranspiration in mm/day and is used directly
qualification: Together with converted precipitation, physical water balance B=pr-PET is in mm/day

implemented_definition: Conditional magnitude rasters store the annual within-cell standardized score Z_y
qualification: Dimensionless; the physical water balance B in mm/day is not stored as the conditional magnitude

implemented_definition: m s-1
qualification: Conditional magnitude rasters use m s-1

implemented_definition: Natural Earth 1:50m country polygons rasterized as land; Natural Earth 1:50m glaciated areas removed; latitude < -60 excluded
qualification: Production manifest records rnaturalearth 0.3.2, sf 1.0.9, and terra 1.7.71; Natural Earth layers were retrieved during production on 18 August 2025

implemented_definition: The production-domain screen excludes cells where the p95 precipitation threshold is <5 mm d-1
qualification: This is a threshold-field screening heuristic, not observed January precipitation or a climatological aridity classification; a separate <10 mm d-1 ancillary mask is calculated but is not applied to event detection

implemented_definition: Excluded if p95 precipitation threshold x 365 is <30 or >2000
qualification: These are threshold-field screening heuristics used to avoid implausible event definitions; they are not annual precipitation or climatological dryland/wet-climate classifications

implemented_definition: Natural Earth medium scale; iso_a3 used except -99 replaced by adm0_a3; geometries validated and dateline wrapped
qualification: Country products use 178 countries with complete five-model finite coverage

implemented_definition: 720 longitudes (-179.75 to 179.75) x 300 latitudes (-59.75 to 89.75); 216,000 centers; 61,533 valid-land centers
qualification: Nominal 0.5-degree global grid north of 60 S with land-valid and hazard-specific masks

implemented_definition: Annual GeoTIFFs encode cell-edge bounds -180/180/-60/90 and 0.5 x 0.5 degree resolution
qualification: Cell centres match the release lookup table

implemented_definition: Cells outside the valid analysis domain are encoded as NoData; release-generation scripts explicitly restore NoData after monthly aggregation
qualification: Representative historical and future count rasters were audited after release correction

implemented_definition: No-event cells/months are NA after infinite results are replaced
qualification: Deposited GeoTIFF NA flag is NaN

implemented_definition: January through December; time stamps are the 15th of each month
qualification: 12 layers per annual GeoTIFF

implemented_definition: Arithmetic mean across five models after country/model aggregation
qualification: Model minimum, maximum and SD describe inter-model spread, not calibrated uncertainty
